regex.target: .setDesc("右上角按钮的功能。如果不需要，请选择‘None’。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Ignore notice when adding, deleting tabs and so on.")
regex.target: .setDesc("增删标签页等操作时禁用提示。")

regex.target: .setDesc("在同一文件中，您可以通过拖放标签页来重新排序。")
.setDesc("标签编辑器中的标签页尺寸")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the duration of inactivity after which the editor will automatically save your work. (default: 5000ms)")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置编辑器自动保存的闲置时间（默认：5000毫秒）")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show tabs border when hover or always.")

regex.source: .setDesc("It's just a decorative setting. If you turn on it, you can still control the cursor into tabs to edit the source code.")
regex.target: .setDesc("此为纯视觉设置，启用后仍可通过光标进入标签页编辑源代码。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show tabs nav items at the top, bottom, left or right.")
regex.target: .setDesc("标签导航项显示位置：顶部、底部、左侧或右侧。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show tabs nav items in one line or multiple lines. Only works when the position is 'top' or 'bottom'")
regex.target: .setDesc("标签导航项布局：单行或多行显示。（仅在位置为“顶部”或“底部”时生效）")

regex.source: .setDesc("If set true, tab title will be limited to the width of the tab. Otherwise, the tab title will be displayed the full width.")
regex.target: .setDesc("标签标题宽度限制：开启时限制为标签页宽度，关闭时显示完整标题。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If a feasible CSS size is set (for example, 250px, 15em, 50vh, etc.), then when the height of the tabs reaches this size, the excess part can be scrolled. Note that the value should not be set too small, otherwise the tabs will not display properly.")
regex.target: .setDesc("可滚动高度设置：设置有效CSS尺寸（如250px、15em、50vh等），当标签高度超过该值时启用滚动。（建议不要设置过小值，否则可能导致显示异常）")

regex.source: setDesc("When enabled, after you modify the settings of the tabs, all markdown files that opened will automatically refresh when you close the settings panel. If disabled, the changes will not take effect immediately on the Tabs in opened markdown file, and you will need to re-render them matually.")
regex.target: setDesc("启用时：修改标签页设置后，关闭设置面板将自动刷新所有已打开的 Markdown 文件；禁用时：更改不会立即应用于已打开的 Markdown 文件标签页，需手动重新渲染。")
